scope: P1-T11 disabled and unavailable action sweep across audited web routes plus representative denied/review states.

lazyweb_reference.query: enterprise SaaS disabled state unavailable action
lazyweb_reference.coverage: weak; used only as an audit reminder to classify unavailable states separately from operational CTA proof

findings: Client, Matter, and Vault representative denied/review routes render explicit guarded state panels.
Matter denied/review routes keep mutation action strips disabled.
People directory representative denied/review routes do not render a denied/review panel; they show an empty relationship state instead.
Profile route renders explicit data-unavailable empty states because profile API/session data is not connected.
